zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter of Salisbury Sheriff of Wiltshire於大約1087年出生在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里時，他的父親Edward of Salisbury28歲，母親First Wife19歲。他和Sibyl Chaworth至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1147年在英國英格蘭維爾爾特尼享年61歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾布拉登斯托可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter of Salisbury Sheriff of Wiltshire于大约1087年出生在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里时，他的父亲Edward of Salisbury28岁，母亲First Wife19岁。他和Sibyl Chaworth至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1147年在英国英格兰維爾爾特尼享年61岁，埋葬在英国維爾爾布拉登斯托可。

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

nameMeanings.name: Salisbury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name primarily from Salesbury in Blackburn (Lancashire) but also occasionally from Salisbury (Wiltshire). The Lancashire placename derives from Old English salh ‘willow, sallow’ + burg ‘fortress’, while the Wiltshire placename arises from a shortened form of the Celtic placename Sorviodunum (from an unknown initial element + Celtic dūno- ‘fort’). In the Old English period the second element was dropped and Sorvio- (of unexplained etymology) became Searo- in Old English as the result of folk etymological association the Old English word searu ‘trick’; to this an explanatory burh ‘fortress, manor, town’ was added. The city is recorded in the Domesday Book as Sarisberie; the change of -r- to -l- is the result of later dissimilation.

variants.name: Salsbury
meanings: Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of Salomon or some other Jewish name beginning with Sa-.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter of Salisbury Sheriff of Wiltshire was born about 1087, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, his father, Edward of Salisbury, was 28 and his mother, First Wife, was 19. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Sibyl Chaworth. He died in 1147, in Chitterne, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61, and was buried in Bradenstoke, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter of Salisbury Sheriff of Wiltshire est né environ 1087, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Edward of Salisbury, avait 28 ans et sa mère, First Wife, avait 19 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Sibyl Chaworth. Il est décédé en 1147, à Chitterne, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Bradenstoke, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter of Salisbury Sheriff of Wiltshire um 1087 in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edward of Salisbury 28 und seine Mutter First Wife 19. Er hatte mit Sibyl Chaworth mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1147 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Chitterne, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Bradenstoke, Wiltshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter of Salisbury Sheriff of Wiltshire è nato il circa 1087 nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, Edward of Salisbury, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, First Wife, aveva 19 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Sibyl Chaworth. Morì nel 1147, nel Chitterne, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Bradenstoke, Wiltshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter of Salisbury Sheriff of Wiltshireが約1087年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで生まれた時，父Edward of Salisburyは28歳，母First Wifeは19歳であった。彼はSibyl Chaworthとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1147年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアチッテルンで61歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアブラデンストクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter of Salisbury Sheriff of Wiltshire(이)가 대략 1087년 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edward of Salisbury(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 First Wife(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Sibyl Chaworth(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1147년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 치터니에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 브라덴스토크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter of Salisbury Sheriff of Wiltshire nasceu aproximadamente 1087, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edward of Salisbury, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, First Wife, tinha 19 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Sibyl Chaworth. Ele faleceu em 1147, em Chitterne, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Bradenstoke, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter of Salisbury Sheriff of Wiltshire родился около 1087 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени Edward of Salisbury было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали First Wife, 19. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Sibyl Chaworth. Он умер в 1147 г. в местности читтирн, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности браденсток, уилцхир, Англия.

Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Sibyl Chaworth. Murió en 1147, en Chitterne, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Bradenstoke, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.
